form.formComment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was a winner at only other fresh up run, scoring in 24.88 over 450m at this track. Has performed below expectations at his last couple but is capable of far better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was a winner at only other fresh up run, scoring in 24.88 over 450m at this track. Has performed below expectations at his last couple but is capable of far better.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (24.96) at Bendigo. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (24.96) at Bendigo. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (24.07) over 425m at Bendigo. Aided by a low draw but will need everything to go his way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (24.07) over 425m at Bendigo. Aided by a low draw but will need everything to go his way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide from home turn.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 1.3 lengths win at The Meadows over 525m in 30.54. Expected to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 1.3 lengths win at The Meadows over 525m in 30.54. Expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.72) when fifth over 450m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Super consistent from the draw with a win and two places from three starts. Among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (25.72) when fifth over 450m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Super consistent from the draw with a win and two places from three starts. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 4 length fourth (24.14) over 425m at Bendigo. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 4 length fourth (24.14) over 425m at Bendigo. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.32) when fifth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (30.32) when fifth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.79) at Geelong in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 5.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and six places from 14 starts. Looks suited and should go close.
